title: Event Horizon
description: A slow descent past the point of no return — typography stretched by gravity itself.

title: Monolith
description: A silent black slab in an ochre desert. The frame holds its breath.

title: Dune Gate
description: Wind-carved arches mark the threshold between two dead empires.

title: First Light
description: Dawn breaking over a terraformed ridge, captured in a single unbroken take.

title: Solar Drift
description: Particles of a dying star, choreographed into a four-minute ballet.

title: Black Meridian
description: A brand system built on longitude lines that never meet.

title: Pale Harbor
description: Fog rolls over an abandoned port where the ships forgot to leave.

title: Iron Valley
description: Rust-colored canyons rendered down to the last oxidized grain.

title: Night Bloom
description: Bioluminescent flora opening exactly once, at exactly midnight.

title: Static Fields
description: Two hundred CRT screens humming the same lost broadcast.

title: Cold Synthesis
description: Analog synthesizers scored to glacier footage shot over nine winters.

title: Vapor Trail
description: The afterimage of a launch, dissolving frame by frame into cyan.

title: Red Shift
description: Everything moving away from you, measured in wavelengths of longing.

title: Hollow Peak
description: A mountain that is only surface — the inside was never written.

title: Glass Desert
description: Sand fused to mirror by an event nobody documented.

title: Echo Terminal
description: Wayfinding for a station that answers every departure with a delay.

title: Low Orbit
description: Ninety-minute sunrises, looped until the crew stopped counting.

title: Afterglow
description: The credits roll on a world that ended quietly, and beautifully.
